button.label: Import CSV
button.screentip: Import schedule updates from a CSV file, preview diffs, and apply to the active project.

button.label: Import JSON
button.screentip: Import schedule updates from a JSON file, preview diffs, and apply to the active project.

button.label: Crew Assignment
button.screentip: Open the crew assignment workflow: parse emails, match crews, push to project.

button.label: Quick Push CSV
button.screentip: Import a pre-assigned CSV and push crew assignments to the active project.
